chapter_blurb: Defines a PersonUnit as a PlanUnit and ContactUnits capable of producing an agenda.
chapter_content: A person is a personunit, made of contacts and plans. All plans are connected to the planroot, which is given all the funds in a personunit.
ontology summary: A PersonUnit is a single planroot and Contacts. conpute awards fund debts and creds to Contacts and defines the PersonUnit's agenda.
